name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with in-store application and same-day funding available.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending company operating physical retail locations across Tennessee and other states, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location serving as one of multiple area branches. The company positions itself as a neighborhood lender offering quick access to emergency funds through both in-store and online application channels. Their business model centers on providing fast cash solutions for consumers facing immediate financial needs without requiring traditional credit approval processes.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans capped at $425 with repayment due around the next paycheck, Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw-down and repayment over time, and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral. They explicitly state borrowers will know exact costs before signing agreements. Additionally, Speedy Cash provides supplementary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit card access. The application process requires standard documentation: government ID, proof of income, proof of address, phone number, and email.

SpeedyCash differentiates itself through emphasis on in-store customer service, allowing borrowers to ask questions throughout the application process and review terms before commitment. The company operates extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays) and maintains multiple locations within the Memphis area. They offer both English (1-888-333-1360) and Spanish (1-855-734-0111) customer service support. The tagline "Tomorrow can be payday®" reflects their positioning around rapid funding for time-sensitive expenses.

A critical assessment reveals Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost short-term lending space where APRs are typically extremely high—though specific rates are not disclosed on this location page, payday loans nationwide commonly exceed 400% APR. This category attracts regulatory scrutiny due to debt-trap potential when borrowers roll over loans. The lack of transparent APR disclosure on the website is a significant consumer protection concern. While the emphasis on in-store review and informed consent is positive, the fundamental product structure carries inherent risks for vulnerable borrowers.
pros: Offers loans up to $4,000 through title loans and lines of credit for larger emergency needs beyond payday loans
Multiple nearby locations in Memphis area (9 stores listed) providing physical access and local service
Extended operating hours including evening (until 7pm weekdays) and Saturday availability (9am-4pm)
Bilingual customer service in English and Spanish with dedicated phone lines
Transparent disclosure that borrowers will know exact loan costs before signing agreements
In-store application process allows real-time questions and document review before commitment
Supplementary money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) reduce need for multiple vendors
cons: No APR or interest rate information disclosed on website, preventing informed rate comparison before visiting
Payday loans typically carry 400%+ APR industry-wide, creating high-cost debt and roll-over risk
Title loans require vehicle lien and collateral, risking loss of transportation for low-income borrowers
Loan amounts capped at $425 for payday products, insufficient for many emergency expenses
No mention of alternatives, credit counseling, or safeguards against predatory lending practices
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and next paycheck expected within 2 weeks
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency amounts ($2,000-$4,000) who can secure title loan approval
Spanish-language speakers seeking bilingual loan application and customer service support
Customers who prefer in-person application experience with opportunity to ask questions before commitment
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who have steady employment income and cannot access traditional bank loans quickly. Critical caveat: payday and title loans are extremely high-cost products (typically 400%+ APR) designed for short-term use only; they frequently trap borrowers in debt cycles through roll-overs and should be considered only as last resorts before exploring nonprofits, credit unions, employer advances, or emergency assistance programs.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral
Loan document review and signing assistance
